nodes.title: REQUIREMENTS
widgets_values:
## Workflow Prerequisites ##

This workflow requires the following custom nodes, which can be obtained via ComfyUI-Manager:

  * Z-Image Power Nodes: https://github.com/martin-rizzo/ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes
  * ComfyUI-GGUF       : https://github.com/city96/ComfyUI-GGUF

 Additionally, ensure you have the following 3 models downloaded and placed in their respective
 directories within your ComfyUI installation:

  z_image_turbo-Q5_K_S.gguf
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/jayn7/Z-Image-Turbo-GGUF/blob/main/z_image_turbo-Q5_K_S.gguf
    * Local Directory: `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models/`

  Qwen3-4B.i1-Q5_K_S.gguf
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/mradermacher/Qwen3-4B-i1-GGUF/blob/main/Qwen3-4B.i1-Q5_K_S.gguf
    * Local Directory: `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders/`

  ae.safetensors
    * Download: https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/blob/main/split_files/vae/ae.safetensors
    * Local Directory: `Comfyui/models/vae/`

## More Info ##

- https://github.com/martin-rizzo/ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes
- https://civitai.com/models/2322533/z-image-power-nodes

Created by Martin Rizzo
  GitHub : https://github.com/martin-rizzo
  CivitAI: https://civitai.com/user/Photographer
  Reddit : https://www.reddit.com/user/FotografoVirtual

nodes.title: Text String (Multiline) - Custom Styles
widgets_values:
>>> CUSTOM 1
>## 90s Underground Flash
YOUR CONTEXT
You are an experimental analog photographer capturing the raw, kinetic energy of the 1990s underground subculture. Your aesthetic is defined by low-fidelity, grainy analog film and a visceral, "in-the-moment" chaos. 
The image is captured through an extreme wide-angle lens, creating aggressive perspective distortion where foreground elements loom over the viewer while the background recedes sharply. The composition is defined by the harsh, unflattering intensity of a direct camera flash, producing high-contrast illumination, slight motion blur, and unpredictable light leaks. The edges of the frame exhibit characteristic wide-angle warping that pulls the environment inward, reinforcing a sense of claustrophobic intensity and instant capture.
{$IFPAL
The color palette reflects the gritty, desaturated nature of 90s push-processed film: shadows are rendered in deep, heavy $3, midtones in cool, muted $2, and highlights are pierced by warm, stinging $1, creating a raw and volatile tonal balance. |
The scene is defined by a chaotic, de-saturated aesthetic with warm, blown-out highlights and dense, crushing shadows, evoking the authentic, lo-fi grit of 35mm film stock pushed to its limits.
}
YOUR PHOTO:
<!--
{$@}
-->


>>> CUSTOM 2
>## 90s Casual Photo // Standard Snapshot
YOUR CONTEXT
You are an analog photographer focusing on the intimate, nostalgic reality of 1990s lifestyle photography. Your work captures the authentic texture of daily life, emphasizing raw, unfiltered emotions and candid humanity.

The image is rendered with the nostalgic charm of consumer-grade 35mm film stock, characterized by visible, organic grain and a slightly soft, naturalistic detail. The lighting relies on a direct on-camera flash that illuminates the scene with a flat, honest brilliance, creating sharp shadows directly behind the subjects that ground them in their environment. The composition is balanced and direct, favoring natural eye-level framing that prioritizes the interaction within the scene, resulting in an image that feels like a rescued memory from a shoebox of old prints.

{$IFPAL
The color palette captures the classic warmth of vintage film prints: shadows are rendered in deep, natural $3, midtones in subtle, earthy $2, and highlights are finished with a delicate $1. |
The scene is defined by a slight color shift toward sepia and cyan undertones, typical of aged photographic paper, delivering a warm, candid, and profoundly human aesthetic.
}
YOUR PHOTO:
<!--
{$@}
-->


>>> CUSTOM 3
>## 90s Casual Photo // Depth Focused
YOUR CONTEXT
You are an analog photographer specializing in the evocative, mood-driven portraits of the 90s era. Your aesthetic prioritizes the emotional connection between the subject and the lens, utilizing high-speed prime lenses to isolate the foreground.

The images feature a shallow depth of field that renders the background as a soft, dreamlike wash of light and color, allowing the subject to emerge with striking clarity from the chaotic environment. The focus is pinpoint sharp on the main subject, while the surrounding atmosphere dissolves into a gentle, creamy blur. Captured on 35mm film, the image retains a fine, tactile grain that softens the transitions between light and shadow. The direct flash provides a distinct, professional-yet-raw luminosity, creating a gentle separation between the sharp subject and the ethereal, blurred background.

{$IFPAL
The color palette is intimate and rich: shadows are rendered in moody $3, midtones in balanced $2, and highlights glow with a soft, punchy $1. |
The scene is defined by a warm, nostalgic film glow, where rich contrast and soft-focus backgrounds coalesce to create a polished, yet beautifully imperfect, 90s editorial atmosphere.
}
YOUR PHOTO:
<!--
{$@}
-->


>>> CUSTOM 4
>## 90s Casual Photo // Night Club Flash
YOUR CONTEXT
You are an nightlife photographer from the mid-90s underground scene. Your images are defined by the high-octane energy of dark, crowded environments and the strobe-like intensity of a powerful, direct-mounted speedlight.

The lighting is characterized by "blacked-out" backgrounds where the ambient light falls off rapidly into deep, underexposed shadows. The flash creates sharp, punchy illumination on the subject, freezing motion with slight ghosting trails. The image features a gritty, high-contrast look with visible film grain, capturing the sweat, smoke, and electric tension of an all-night rave.

{$IFPAL
The color palette is neon-heavy and nocturnal: shadows are rendered in deep, crushing $3, midtones in cool, electronic $2, and highlights are illuminated by a sharp, clinical $1. |
The scene is defined by high-contrast saturation, where intense light blasts against impenetrable darkness, evoking the aggressive, nocturnal aesthetic of rave culture.
}
YOUR PHOTO:
<!--
{$@}
-->


>>> CUSTOM 5
>## 90s Casual Photo // Disposable Camera
YOUR CONTEXT
You are documenting the raw, unpolished simplicity of 90s snapshots taken with a cheap, cardboard disposable camera. Your aesthetic is inherently humble, unpretentious, and nostalgic.

The lens is a simple, fixed-focus plastic element that introduces soft edge-blur and subtle chromatic aberration. Lighting is provided by a weak, direct-mounted flash that creates a harsh "pop" against flat backgrounds. The image displays the characteristic "cheap" quality of consumer film: visible, heavy grain, uneven color shifts, and a slightly murky, warm-toned emulsion that feels like it was developed at a local drugstore.

{$IFPAL
The color palette is muted and consumer-grade: shadows are rendered in brownish $3, midtones in flat $2, and highlights in soft, sun-washed $1. |
The scene is defined by a distinct "drugstore print" look, characterized by warm, hazy transitions, slightly muddy blacks, and the charming imperfections of amateur photography.
}
YOUR PHOTO:
<!--
{$@}
-->


>>> CUSTOM 6
>## 90s Casual Photo // Overexposed Summer
YOUR CONTEXT
You are capturing the lazy, hazy, and heat-drenched days of 90s suburban summers. Your photographs are characterized by light-saturated frames and a dreamlike, sun-bleached atmosphere.

The images are intentionally overexposed, causing highlights to bloom and spill into the surrounding areas, effectively "washing out" the details in the brighter parts of the frame. The contrast is soft, and the overall color temperature leans toward a golden, high-key warmth. The texture is characterized by fine film grain dancing within the bright light, creating a shimmering, nostalgic sensation of a heatwave captured on celluloid.

{$IFPAL
The color palette is sun-drenched and faded: shadows are rendered in soft $3, midtones in warm $2, and highlights are blown out with a brilliant, creamy $1. |
The scene is defined by high-key luminosity, where light overwhelms the shadows to create an airy, nostalgic aesthetic reminiscent of long, aimless summer afternoons.
}
YOUR PHOTO:
<!--
{$@}
-->


>>> CUSTOM 7
>## 90s Casual Photo // Light Leak Overflow
YOUR CONTEXT
You are an experimental photographer using vintage, poorly-sealed film bodies that allow rogue light to compromise the film frame. Your aesthetic celebrates the unpredictable beauty of physical failure.

The image is permeated by vibrant, organic light leaks that appear as streaks or washes of amber, magenta, or red across the frame. These leaks act as luminous overlays, softening the image and creating a surreal, ethereal atmosphere. The underlying shot remains sharp, but the light interference adds a thick, chemical texture to the frame, blending the subject with the raw, chaotic energy of the film development process.

{$IFPAL
The color palette is infused with chemical warmth: shadows are rendered in $3, midtones in $2, and the light leaks are highlighted by a radiant, saturated $1. |
The scene is defined by a beautiful, chaotic interaction between light and film, featuring swirling, warm-toned light leaks that wash over the composition in a dreamlike, lo-fi display.
}
YOUR PHOTO:
<!--
{$@}
-->


>>> CUSTOM 8
>## 90s Casual Photo // Harsh Fluorescent Tint
YOUR CONTEXT
You are documenting the mundane, industrial aesthetic of 90s public spaces, malls, and offices. Your work captures the stark, unflattering, and distinctly "off-putting" quality of artificial fluorescent lighting.

The lighting is flat and top-down, casting sickly, greenish-tinted shadows that add a sense of unease and clinical realism to the image. The image lacks the warmth of traditional film, instead favoring a cold, sterile, and slightly repulsive color shift. The texture is grainy, reflecting the difficulty of shooting in low, flickering light, and the overall mood is one of detached, everyday alienation characteristic of the mid-90s urban landscape.

{$IFPAL
The color palette is cold and synthetic: shadows are rendered in sickly $3, midtones in muted $2, and highlights are cast in a sterile, pale $1. |
The scene is defined by a harsh, green-cyan color cast and flat, shadow-filled lighting that evokes the soulless, utilitarian atmosphere of fluorescent-lit 90s interiors.
}
YOUR PHOTO:
<!--
{$@}
-->

A heavy and robust Terminator T-800, with a metallic silver chrome exterior, sits in a black office chair behind a reflective glass desk. Its left hand holds a red can of Coca-Cola with a white logo, while its right hand rests on the desk surface. In front of the robot is an open silver laptop with a black keyboard. The glass desk reflects the robot's metallic arms and the red Coca-Cola can. In the blurred background, a window reveals a modern building with glass panels. To the robot's left, a green plant with green leaves rests in a white pot on a brown wooden shelf. To the right, another smaller green plant in a white pot and a circular silver sculpture also sit on the shelf. In the background, at the far right of the image, partially visible, is Kermit the Frog.

nodes.title: README
widgets_values:
ATTENTION: This workflow is entirely experimental, used for testing next version nodes, so the nodes employed may undergo changes or be directly removed. This could result in generated images that cannot be reproduced in the future.

Reference workflow for text-to-image with the Z-Image Turbo model and the Power Nodes.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Select the desired size and aspect ratio of the output image using the "Empty Z-Image Latent Image" node. This node generates vertical images by default, prioritizing a mobile-first approach, but it has the option to activate horizontal (landscape) images.

Compose your text prompt in the "Style & Prompt Encoder ^G2.1" node, while selecting a visual style that defines the aesthetic direction of your generated image. Optionally, you can also select one of the predefined color palettes (they only work with certain styles).


Finally, adjust your image generation within the "Z-Sampler Turbo ^G2.1" node:

- STEPS: Adjust the number of sampling iterations to control image detail. In practice, 8 steps work well; using fewer steps (e.g., '3') allows you to quickly test prompt changes, as the sampler maintains the overall composition throughout the entire step range. DEFAULT: 8

- IBIAS: Set this to 0.0 in most cases; it offers a subtle control similar to 'brightness', though its exact effect depends on the prompt and chosen style, so it may not always behave as a brightness control. Test both positive and negative values to discover which gives the best result. DEFAULT: 0.0

- SPECTRAL_TILT: modifies the spectral component of the stochastic noise added at each step. When applied in the initial stages (1 or 2), it can help improve general composition details. When applied in the final stages (2 or 3), it can help enhance fine details.
   * 'none': uses conventional Euler in all stages.
   * 'stages..': specifies in which stages to apply spectral_tilt using Euler Ancestral

- TURBO_CREATIVITY: Enhances the diversity of generated images by altering the composition while retaining prompt instructions and visual style. Note that this feature may introduce hallucinations. Seed numbers that are multiples of 3 tend to produce less coherent images.

- ALTERNATIVE_REFINER: Define which sampler will be used in the final stage (3). When activated, it uses "DPM++ SDE", which can help improve contrast, generating sharper images with finer details.

- OLD_SCHEDULER: Switches to the legacy scheduler, which can sometimes deliver better results in specific situations.


Additionally, at the bottom of the workflow, there is an optional multiline node that allows you to redefine the "Custom" styles.
